---
title: "Finding Beta is Hard — All Experiments"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    df-print: paged
editor: visual
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(fmatrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)


Logdistance_prob <- function(fmat, centre = NULL, beta = c(1, 1, 1)) {
  n <- dim(fmat)[1] + 1
  if (is.null(centre)) centre <- kingman_m(n)

  d2 <- distance_Fmat(fmat, centre, dist = "l2")^2
  Fnorm <- norm(fmat, "F")
  cherries <- num_cherries(fmat)

  return(-beta[1] * d2 - beta[2] * Fnorm - beta[3] * cherries)
}

sampleF <- function(M, beta, iter, startF = NULL){
  acceptance_rate <- 0
  n <- nrow(M) + 1

  chainF <- vector("list", iter)

  if (is.null(startF)) {
    current_tree <- rcoal(n)
    chainF[[1]]  <- gen_Fmat(current_tree, tol=13)
  } else {
    chainF[[1]] <- startF
  }

  current_Encod <- my_encod(chainF[[1]])
  f_current     <- Fmat_from_myencod(current_Encod)
  Logdist_curr  <- Logdistance_prob(f_current, M, beta=beta)

  MeanM <- matrix(0, nrow=n-1, ncol=n-1)

  for (j in 1:iter){
    proposed    <- proposal_myencod(current_Encod)
    f_proposed  <- Fmat_from_myencod(proposed)
    Logdist_prop <- Logdistance_prob(f_proposed, M, beta=beta)

    prob <- exp(Logdist_prop - Logdist_curr)

    if (runif(1) < prob){
      chainF[[j]]     <- f_proposed
      current_Encod   <- proposed
      f_current       <- f_proposed
      Logdist_curr    <- Logdist_prop
      acceptance_rate <- acceptance_rate + 1
    } else {
      chainF[[j]] <- f_current
    }

    MeanM <- MeanM + chainF[[j]]
  }

  MeanM <- MeanM/iter
  list(
    chainF = chainF,
    acceptance_rate = acceptance_rate/iter,
    MeanM = MeanM
  )
}


find_beta <- function(beta, CD_params, n = 25, iter = 100000,
                      start_at_tree = FALSE, use_true_mean = TRUE) {

  cat("Testing beta = ", paste(beta, collapse = ", "), "\n")

  burn_in     <- CD_params$burn_in
  k           <- CD_params$k
  trials      <- CD_params$trials
  batch_size  <- CD_params$batch_size
  print_every <- CD_params$print_every
  step0       <- CD_params$step0


  beta_star <- CD_params$beta_star
  if (length(beta_star) != 3) stop("CD_params$beta_star must be a length-3 vector.")



  sample_tree <- rcoal(n)
  M <- gen_Fmat(sample_tree)

  
  if (start_at_tree) {
    samples <- sampleF(M = M, beta = beta, iter = iter, startF = M)
  } else {
    samples <- sampleF(M = M, beta = beta, iter = iter)
  }

  chain <- samples$chainF
  burn_in <- min(burn_in, length(chain) - 1)
  chain <- chain[(burn_in + 1):length(chain)]
  n_data <- length(chain)

  distro_mean <- if (use_true_mean) M else samples$MeanM

  # helper: sufficient stats for logprob
  stats <- function(x, centre) {
    d2 <- distance_Fmat(x, centre, dist = "l2")^2
    fF <- norm(x, "F")
    ch <- num_cherries(x)
    c(d2 = d2, Fnorm = fF, cherries = ch)
  }

  beta_star_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = trials, ncol = 3)
  colnames(beta_star_mat) <- c("beta1_star", "beta2_star", "beta3_star")

  for (t in 1:trials) {
    idx <- sample.int(n_data, batch_size, replace = TRUE)

    s_pos <- c(d2 = 0, Fnorm = 0, cherries = 0)
    s_neg <- c(d2 = 0, Fnorm = 0, cherries = 0)

    for (b in 1:batch_size) {
      x0 <- chain[[idx[b]]]

      s_pos <- s_pos + stats(x0, distro_mean)

      out <- sampleF(M = distro_mean, beta = beta_star, iter = k + 1, startF = x0)
      xk <- out$chainF[[k + 1]]

      s_neg <- s_neg + stats(xk, distro_mean)
    }

    E_pos <- s_pos / batch_size
    E_neg <- s_neg / batch_size

    # CD gradient matching your scalar convention:
    g <- c(
      beta1 = (E_neg["d2"] - E_pos["d2"]),
      beta2 = (E_neg["Fnorm"] - E_pos["Fnorm"]),
      beta3 = (E_neg["cherries"] - E_pos["cherries"])
    )

    beta_star <- beta_star + step0 * g
    beta_star <- pmax(beta_star, 1e-8)  # keep positive
    beta_star[2] = 0
    beta_star_mat[t, ] <- beta_star

    if (t %% print_every == 0) {
      cat(
        "trial", t,
        "beta_star =", paste(format(beta_star, digits = 4), collapse = ", "),
        "\n"
      )
    }
  }

  tibble::tibble(
    beta1 = beta[1], beta2 = beta[2], beta3 = beta[3],
    trial = 1:trials,
    beta1_star = beta_star_mat[, 1],
    beta2_star = beta_star_mat[, 2],
    beta3_star = beta_star_mat[, 3]
  )
}



summarize_run <- function(traj, tail_frac = 0.5) {
  T <- nrow(traj)
  start <- floor(T * (1 - tail_frac)) + 1

  tibble(
    beta1 = traj$beta1[1],
    beta2 = traj$beta2[1],
    beta3 = traj$beta3[1],
    trials = T,

    beta1_star_final = traj$beta1_star[T],
    beta2_star_final = traj$beta2_star[T],
    beta3_star_final = traj$beta3_star[T],

    beta1_star_mean_tail = mean(traj$beta1_star[start:T]),
    beta2_star_mean_tail = mean(traj$beta2_star[start:T]),
    beta3_star_mean_tail = mean(traj$beta3_star[start:T]),

    beta1_star_sd_tail = sd(traj$beta1_star[start:T]),
    beta2_star_sd_tail = sd(traj$beta2_star[start:T]),
    beta3_star_sd_tail = sd(traj$beta3_star[start:T])
  )
}

```

## Run all experiments (single cell)

```{r}
# ---- Define your experiment grid here ----
exp_grid <- tibble::tribble(
  ~beta1, ~beta2, ~beta3, ~beta_star0,        ~step0,

  # ---- Sweep beta1 ----
  0.1, 0.0, 0.0,  c(1, 0, 0), 0.01,
  0.3, 0.0, 0.0,  c(1, 0, 0), 0.01,
  0.7, 0.0, 0.0,  c(1, 0, 0), 0.01,
  1.0, 0.0, 0.0,  c(1, 0, 0), 0.05,
  1.5, 0.0, 0.0,  c(2, 0, 0), 0.07,
  2.5, 0.0, 0.0,  c(3, 0, 0), 0.10,
  5.0, 0.0, 0.0,  c(6, 0, 0), 0.10,


  # ---- Sweep beta3 ----
  0.0, 0.0, 0.1,  c(0, 0, 1), 0.01,
  0.0, 0.0, 0.3,  c(0, 0, 1), 0.01,
  0.0, 0.0, 0.7,  c(0, 0, 1), 0.01,
  0.0, 0.0, 1.0,  c(0, 0, 1), 0.01,
  0.0, 0.0, 1.5,  c(0, 0, 2), 0.07,
  0.0, 0.0, 2.5,  c(0, 0, 3), 0.10,
  0.0, 0.0, 5.0,  c(0, 0, 6), 0.10
)



base_params <- list(
  burn_in = 500,
  k = 8,
  trials = 100000,
  batch_size = 20,
  print_every = 1000
)

# ---- Run everything ----
set.seed(1)

runs <- exp_grid %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Using mapply instead of purrr::pmap
    beta_vec = mapply(c, beta1, beta2, beta3, SIMPLIFY = FALSE),
    CD_params = purrr::map2(
      beta_star0, step0,
      ~ modifyList(base_params, list(beta_star = .x, step0 = .y))
    ),
    t0 = Sys.time(),
    traj = purrr::map2(
      beta_vec, CD_params,
      ~ find_beta(beta = .x, CD_params = .y, n = 25, iter = 100000,
                  start_at_tree = FALSE, use_true_mean = TRUE)
    ),
    t1 = Sys.time(),
    seconds = as.numeric(difftime(t1, t0, units = "secs")),
    summary = purrr::map(traj, summarize_run)
  )

# ---- Summary table ----
summary_tbl <- runs %>%
  dplyr::select(beta_star0, step0, seconds, summary) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(summary) %>%
  relocate(beta1, beta2, beta3, .before = everything()) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(beta1))

summary_tbl
write.csv(summary_tbl %>% select(-beta_star0), "summary_table_MultiParam.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r}
# Pretty view
knitr::kable(
  summary_tbl,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "Beta experiments (one run per beta vector). Tail stats use the last 50% of trials."
)
```
## BETA 1 + 3

```{r}
 exp_grid <- tibble::tribble(
  ~beta1, ~beta2, ~beta3, ~beta_star0,        ~step0,

  # ---- Sweep beta1 and beta3 ----
  0.1, 0.0, 0.1,  c(1, 0, 1), 0.01,
  0.3, 0.0, 0.3,  c(1, 0, 1), 0.01,
  0.5, 0.0, 0.5,  c(1, 0, 1), 0.05,
  0.7, 0.0, 0.7,  c(1, 0, 1), 0.07,
  1.0, 0.0, 1.0,  c(2, 0, 2), 0.10,
  2.0, 0.0, 2.0,  c(4, 0, 4), 0.10,
  3.0, 0.0, 3.0,  c(4, 0, 5), 0.10,

  # ---- Sweep beta2 ----
  0.1, 0.0, 1,  c(1, 0, 2), 0.01,
  0.3, 0.0, 0.7,  c(1, 0, 1), 0.01,
  0.5, 0.0, 2,  c(1, 0, 1), 0.05,
  0.7, 0.0, 0.3,  c(1, 0, 1), 0.07,
  1.0, 0.0, 0.5,  c(2, 0, 1.5), 0.10,
  2.0, 0.0, 3.0,  c(4, 0, 4), 0.10,
  3.0, 0.0, 1.0,  c(4, 0, 3), 0.10,
)

base_params <- list(
  burn_in = 500,
  k = 8,
  trials = 100000,
  batch_size = 20,
  print_every = 1000
)

# ---- Run everything ----
set.seed(1)

runs <- exp_grid %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Using mapply instead of purrr::pmap
    beta_vec = mapply(c, beta1, beta2, beta3, SIMPLIFY = FALSE),
    CD_params = purrr::map2(
      beta_star0, step0,
      ~ modifyList(base_params, list(beta_star = .x, step0 = .y))
    ),
    t0 = Sys.time(),
    traj = purrr::map2(
      beta_vec, CD_params,
      ~ find_beta(beta = .x, CD_params = .y, n = 25, iter = 100000,
                  start_at_tree = FALSE, use_true_mean = TRUE)
    ),
    t1 = Sys.time(),
    seconds = as.numeric(difftime(t1, t0, units = "secs")),
    summary = purrr::map(traj, summarize_run)
  )



# ---- Summary table ----
summary_tbl <- runs %>%
  dplyr::select(beta_star0, step0, seconds, summary) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(summary) %>%
  relocate(beta1, beta2, beta3, .before = everything()) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(beta1))

summary_tbl
write.csv(summary_tbl %>% select(-beta_star0), "summary_table_MultiParam_Beta1Beta3.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
```{r}
summary_tbl_multiparam <- read.csv("summary_table_MultiParam_Beta1Beta3.csv")
summary_tbl_multiparam %>% select(beta1, beta3, beta1_star_mean_tail, beta3_star_mean_tail)

```

```{r}
# Pretty view
knitr::kable(
  summary_tbl,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "Beta experiments (one run per beta vector). Tail stats use the last 50% of trials."
)
```
